meta.description: Enumerates every internal source bucket in the episode registry. G001 requires all current buckets to be represented.
meta.honesty_note: This index is descriptive, not aspirational. It records what exists now, including buckets that are blocked or local-only.

buckets.label: Public training curriculum
buckets.notes: All six public families are benchmark_ready and ship in public-benchmark-pack-v1.

buckets.label: Blocked teacher-only families (repo-visible, pending rewrite)
buckets.blocked_reason: Current repo already discloses framing for h1/h2/h3. Cannot honestly claim these as sealed or promote to teacher-only benchmark status until rewritten with fresh non-repo-visible wording.
buckets.notes: Listed in the family registry as blocked_pending_rewrite. Not included in any benchmark pack.

buckets.label: Local-only private holdout evaluation path
buckets.notes: Template exists at benchmarks/private-holdout-pack-template.json. Actual holdout episodes are authored locally in a gitignored manifest. No episodes are committed to the repo. This bucket has zero committed families.

completeness.notes: Every scenario in seed/role-foundry-apprentice.json maps to exactly one bucket.
